# filterName()

**Instance Method**

Returns the name of the  filter that is currently selected in the filter browser.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func filterName() -> String!
```

## Return Value

The name of the currently selected filter.

## Discussion

Use this method in response to the notifications [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKFilterBrowserFilterSelectedNotification] or [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKFilterBrowserFilterDoubleClickNotification], or after the user makes a choice in a dialog.
